case_title: HEATHER ZEMANSKY VS. VINCENT CHU et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHU, VINCENT JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR ERNEST BENJAMIN LAGESON.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-03-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHU, VINCENT
ARBITRATOR KEVIN JAIME GRAY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-25-2013 THROUGH APR-25-2013.

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-03-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-04-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. JURISDICTION OF THE ARBITRATOR IS EXTENDED THROUGH FEB-03-2014. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON DEC-03-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. ***NOTE: WITHOUT COMPLYING WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 4.1 L, THE COURT EXPECTS THE PARTIES TO COMPLETE ARBITRATION EVEN THOUGH THEY ALSO ATTENDED MEDIATION.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
